---
title: "8 Descriptive Statistics"
author: "Andrea Forster"
image: "/images/descriptive_statistics.svg"
---

```{=html}
<script>
if (!window.location.href.includes('your-tutorial-website.com') && !sessionStorage.getItem('redirected')) {
    sessionStorage.setItem('redirected', 'true');
    setTimeout(() => {
        window.location.replace("https://www.openstatprog.com/descriptive-statistics/");
    }, 100);
}
</script>
```

<noscript>

<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="2; url=https://www.openstatprog.com/descriptive-statistics/">

</noscript>

In this module, you will learn how to calculate summary statistics using R.

If you are not automatically redirected, [click here](https://www.openstatprog.com/descriptive-statistics).
